nodes.label: Main Menu
nodes.prompt: Thank you for calling Acme Corp. Press 1 for billing, 2 for account services, or 3 for order support.
nodes.invalid_input_prompt: Sorry, that was not a valid selection.

nodes.label: Billing Menu
nodes.prompt: For a billing dispute, press 1. To cancel your service, press 2.
nodes.invalid_input_prompt: Sorry, that billing selection was not recognized.

nodes.label: Account Services Menu
nodes.prompt: For password reset help, press 1. To update your profile, press 2.
nodes.invalid_input_prompt: Sorry, that account services selection was not recognized.

nodes.label: Order Support Menu
nodes.invalid_input_prompt: Sorry, that order support selection was not recognized.

nodes.label: Password Reset Specialist
nodes.prompt: Please hold while I connect you to our password reset specialist.

nodes.label: Billing Dispute Specialist
nodes.prompt: Please hold while I connect you to our billing dispute specialist.

nodes.label: Order Status Specialist
nodes.prompt: Please hold while I connect you to our order status specialist.

nodes.label: Profile Update Specialist
nodes.prompt: Please hold while I connect you to our profile update specialist.

nodes.label: Cancellation Specialist
nodes.prompt: Please hold while I connect you to our cancellation specialist.
